## Description

A clear and concise description of what this PR does.

Closes: #000

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an issue without changing behavior)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)

- Item 1

## Testing

How have you tested this change?

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing performed
- [ ] No tests needed (documentation only, etc.)

### Test Coverage

Describe what was tested and how.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING.md guide
- [ ] I have run `bun run lint` and fixed any issues
- [ ] I have run `bun run check-types` with no errors
- [ ] I have run `bun run test` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have added a changeset (if user-facing change)
- [ ] I have updated documentation if needed
- [ ] My changes follow the code style guidelines

## Changesets

If this is a user-facing change, did you add a changeset?

```bash
bun run changeset
```

- [ ] Yes, changeset added
- [ ] Not needed (internal change, docs, etc.)
